title: Moroccan Stir Fry
description: A flavorful and nutritious stir fry made with whole wheat and a blend of spices.

ingredients.name: Dense vegetables (such as carrots, potatoes, and sweet potatoes)

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the chopped vegetables and cook until tender.
Add the sliced bitter gourd and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Add the spices and stir well.
Add the whole wheat and stir to combine.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Optional: add other spices or herbs to taste.
Note: adjust cooking time based on desired level of doneness.
